headline: Congress light on action as Senate holds pro forma session and House wraps early summer push!

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate met briefly in pro forma session on July 9, adjourning after 30 seconds. No business was conducted.

onTheFloor.title: Confirmation for United States Circuit Judge for the Second Circuit
Confirmation for United States District Judge for the Southern District of Texas
onTheFloor.status: confirmation vote scheduled for 5:30 PM Monday

house.lastSessionSummary: The House met briefly on July 9, adjourning after three minutes. Thirty-nine public bills and three resolutions were introduced, and six committee reports were filed on various topics including ALS therapy access, NIH initiatives, and aviation security.

onTheFloor.title: Sunshine Protection Act of 2025 - daylight saving time measures
National Security, Department of State, and Related Programs Appropriations Act, 2027
Take Care of America's Veterans Act
Amend the Accelerating Access to Critical Therapies for ALS Act to reauthorize through fiscal year 2031
Establish the IMPROVE Initiative within the National Institutes of Health
Establish funds for investments in aviation security

committees.topic: Hearing on Sunshine Protection Act of 2025, national security appropriations, veterans benefits, and privacy in purchases

committees.committee: Committee on Veterans' Affairs - Subcommittee on Technology Modernization
committees.topic: PACT Act Implementation: Modernizing VA Disability Claims Through Effective Technology
